name: linux-admin
description: Senior Linux administrator and SRE workflow as a Claude Code plugin. Covers 108 task-specific skills for boot, networking, storage, Linux proxying, RDP and Linux remote desktop, load balancing, web proxies, enterprise ADCs, Linux L4 balancing, DNS traffic steering, cloud load balancers, kernel, auth, logging, databases, web servers, backup/restore, incident response, defensive security validation, security scoring, patching, SELinux, AppArmor, capacity planning, and production safety.
